name: Scrap Metal
description: A jagged bit of the facility that fell off. The Warden calls this 'decor'.

name: Cloth
description: Torn from a previous subject's jumpsuit. They won't need it.

name: Goo Blob
description: It's warm. Nobody knows why it's warm.

name: Glow Mushroom
description: Grows in the vents. Smells like regret and blueberries.

name: Cog
description: Every facility runs on these. This one runs slightly worse now.

name: Hammer
description: Breaks cracked walls on contact. Percussive problem solving.

name: Spring Boots
description: Jump ~35% higher. Warranty void if used for escaping.

name: Lockpick
description: Opens one locked door, then retires forever. Single-use.

name: Smoke Bomb
description: Stuns nearby enemies. Also great at parties.

name: Sticky Trap
description: Place it down. Enemies that touch it are done having a good time.

name: Sock Puppet
description: It does nothing. It judges you. The Warden loves him.
